name: Reswell Capsule
description: Reswell Capsules is a combination of KSM-66™ Organic Ashwagandha Extract & Lemon Balm Extract. KSM-66™ is clinically proven to relieve stress and anxiety, improves sleep quality and cognitive function. Lemon Balm Extract improves mental focus and promotes a calm and positive mood.
benefits: Reduces stress, anxiety, cortisol levels and stress-related food cravings
Improves sleep quality & shorter time falling asleep
Can be taken long term to maintain good cognitive health
Effects seen within 1 hour of intake

dosage.therapeutic: 1 capsule twice daily preferably after meals
dosage.maintenance: 1 capsule once or twice daily after meals

ingredients: Lemon Balm Extract 180mg (standardized to min. 5% rosmarinic acid)
who_can_consume: Adults experiencing stress, anxiety, sleep issues, or seeking cognitive support.
who_cannot_consume: Not specified. Consult a healthcare professional if pregnant, nursing, or on sedative medications.

qa.question: How quickly does Reswell work?
qa.answer: Reswell can be taken on demand where effects are seen within 1 hour of intake and are still measurable after 3 to 4 hours. For long-term benefits like reduced cortisol levels and improved sleep quality, consistent use over 8 weeks is recommended.

qa.question: Can I take Reswell long term?
qa.answer: Yes, Reswell can be taken long term to maintain good cognitive health and stress management. Clinical studies showed significant reduction in serum cortisol levels after 8 weeks of consistent use.
